Author: Aireil
Name: FF Logs Viewer
Description: View FF Logs ranking percentiles in-game. Add a context menu to open someone's logs. Layout, style, stats, default metric, and more are all customizable in the settings.
Punchline: View FF Logs ranking percentiles in-game.
Changelog:
-2.5.1.2
    Fix player name parsing on CN version.
-2.5.1.1
    Fix clipboard search not working due to Dalamud-related changes.
-2.5.1.0
    Add support for CN client. Thank you to Nukoooo for the changes and for having supported it since 2022.
-2.5.0.1
    Update for 7.5 patch.
